data.title: Penn State Smeal College of Business introduces Master of Applied AI for Business Transformation program.
data.description: Penn State Smeal College of Business announced on January 27, 2026, a new hybrid graduate degree program aimed at empowering working professionals to make a real-world impact with AI. This innovative program is designed to prepare professionals for future business challenges. The degree program offers a blend of online and in-person coursework, providing flexibility for working individuals. This initiative aims to bridge the gap between academia and industry, equipping professionals with the necessary skills for success. The program is set to enroll a significant number of students seeking to enhance their expertise in AI and drive innovation in their respective fields.

data.title: Generational Group facilitates sale of VARA 3D to ZenaTech on Dec 16, 2025. VARA 3D specializes in land surveying and 3D mapping services in Murray, Utah.
data.description: Dallas-based Generational Group has successfully facilitated the acquisition of VARA 3D, Inc. by ZenaTech, Inc., a deal that was finalized on December 16, 2025. VARA 3D, Inc., based in Murray, Utah, is known for its expertise in commercial, residential, and solar energy projects catering to a diverse clientele. The company offers services such as land surveying, 3D mapping, and construction staking, serving both commercial and utility sectors.

data.title: Hospitality workers in 2026 prioritize work-life balance over promotions, survey shows. 120+ workers polled in U.S.
data.description: In Miami on January 27, 2026, a recent survey conducted by OysterLink indicates a change in focus for restaurant and hospitality professionals in the upcoming year. The survey, which involved over 120 individuals in the industry nationwide, highlighted a shift in priorities. It was found that the primary career objective for 2026 among these professionals is...

data.title: Dubai Media City celebrates 25 years; part of TECOM Group's Media Cluster with 40,000+ professionals in Middle East's media sector.
data.description: Thanks to the region's top media hub, TECOM Group established its Media Cluster, which consists of Dubai Production City and Dubai Studio City. This cluster serves as a comprehensive ecosystem for over 40,000 media and creative experts.

data.title: Arcos LLC and OverIT partner for utility field operations efficiency, strengthening FSM solutions worldwide.
data.description: Today, in Columbus, Ohio and Milan, a partnership was revealed between Arcos LLC and OverIT. Arcos LLC specializes in utility resource management and work execution software, while OverIT is known for its field service management solutions. This strategic integration and distribution agreement will solidify their collaboration in the future, expanding their reach in the market. This announcement signifies a significant step in combining their expertise to better serve their clients.

data.title: Launchpoint acquires Kashie.AI, an AI music content platform, in a corrected news release issued on January 27, 2026.
data.description: Launchpoint announced the acquisition of Kashie.AI, an AI music content platform, on January 27, 2026. This news came via a press release distributed over PR Newswire. The acquisition includes hyperlinks for further information. The deal marks a significant move for Launchpoint in expanding its presence in the AI music industry.

data.title: Gatik operates first fully driverless trucks at scale in North America for commercial deliveries, with $600M contracted revenue.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Gatik has made history by being the first company in North America to roll out fully autonomous trucks in large-scale commercial operations. With a remarkable $600 million in contracted revenue, Gatik is servicing Fortune 50 retailers on a daily basis, without the presence of a human driver or safety observer in the driver's seat. This significant achievement signifies a groundbreaking advancement in autonomous trucking, transitioning from small-scale trials to consistent, revenue-producing services that are enhancing local supply chains.

data.title: MBZUAI launches K2 Think V2, a 70-billion parameter reasoning system in collaboration with G42 and Cerebras Systems.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on January 27, 2026, G42, Cerebras Systems, and the Institute of Foundation Models at Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI) revealed the launch of K2 Think V2. This cutting-edge system boasts 70 billion parameters for advanced reasoning, marking a significant technological advancement in the field.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to classes of notes by Avtech Equipment Receivables Funding 2026-1, LLC. Avtech Capital offers middle-market equipment leases.
data.description: KBRA has allocated preliminary ratings to four classes of notes from Avtech Equipment Receivables Funding 2026-1, LLC (Avtech 2026-1), an equipment ABS transaction. Avtech Capital, LLC, the Servicer, has been in operation since 2002 and specializes in equipment finance and leasing. The Company caters to middle-market commercial equipment leases across a range of industries. As of December 31, 2025, Avtech’s services have impacted various sectors, showcasing its strong market presence.

data.title: Way introduces AI-powered products for experience curation, loyalty, & brand partnerships. Expands platform for brands.
data.description: Today, in the cities of Austin, Texas and Paris, Way has revealed its transformed platform, now a comprehensive experiential ecosystem. This upgrade brings vast opportunities for brands, from increasing ancillary revenue to reshaping customer loyalty.

data.title: Contextual AI unveils Agent Composer for aerospace, manufacturing, and more, reducing tasks from hours to minutes.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, on January 27, 2026, Contextual AI announced their new platform designed to enhance AI agents in industries such as aerospace, semiconductors, manufacturing, and other advanced sectors. This technology streamlines intricate tasks, reducing the time required from hours to mere minutes. The platform aims to revolutionize operational efficiencies in these fields, potentially transforming workflows and productivity.

data.title: Inventor from St. Petersburg, Fla. creates NOW WE ARE ROLLING wheel components for washers & dryers.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, an inventor from Saint Petersburg, Florida, shared their innovative product, the NOW WE ARE ROLLING, aimed at improving the transportation of washers or dryers. The inventor believed there was room for improvement in this area and designed a patent-pending solution to address this issue. This invention can be utilized during deliveries, relocation, or maintenance activities.

data.title: AirDNA released its Best Places to Invest in Short-Term Rentals for 2026, highlighting top US markets for strong returns.
data.description: Today, January 27, 2026, AirDNA, a top provider of data and analysis for short-term rentals, published its yearly report on the Best Places to Invest in Short-Term Rentals in the United States for 2026. The report highlights the U.S. markets with the most robust returns on investment for short-term rentals.

data.title: Conexus expands to Salt Lake City in 2026 as part of growth strategy into 3 new markets, serving clients nationwide.
data.description: In Irvine, California on January 27, 2026, Conexus announced its ambitious plans for the year ahead. The company is set to implement a strategic organic growth plan by entering three additional markets, extending its reach from the West Coast. Despite this expansion, Conexus remains dedicated to catering to clients across the country. The initial market chosen for expansion is...

data.title: Trupanion celebrates 25 years, 3.8M+ pet parents helped with insurance in North America and Europe.
data.description: Trupanion, Inc. (Nasdaq: TRUP), a prominent pet medical insurance provider in North America, has assisted over 3.8 million pet owners in Canada, the U.S., and Continental Europe to financially prepare for unforeseen pet medical expenses. On January 27, 2026, the company based in Seattle is commemorating its success in aiding pet parents across these regions.
